items.title: Cold Court’s debut EP is an infectious, glitchy genre mashup
items.summary: Cold Court is a brother-sister duo from Philly that seems to love nothing more than shoving all of their influences together in a messy soup that at least superficially resemble...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Polymarket reportedly paid creators to post deceptive videos about fake bets
items.summary: Many of those videos were reportedly filmed on “near-perfect copies” of the Polymarket website, while featuring trades and winnings that were not real.

items.title: NASA's Perseverance rover has traveled the distance of a marathon on Mars
items.summary: It did so in just five years.
